results.name: has_hook
results.detail: "A little morning sun *goes a long way*."

results.name: has_cta
results.detail: button must be "Download Vibe Health →" + highlighted title

results.name: follows_json_schema
results.detail: key, theme not in health/looksmax, bg_prompts

rationales.hook_strength: 'A little morning sun goes a long way' is soft and familiar — no specific contrast or concrete payoff to interrupt a scroll.
rationales.clarity: Each slide holds one idea and the hedge language is consistent, though slide 2 and 3 slightly overlap on the 'what it does' angle.
rationales.audience_fit: Vitamin D basics skew older-health-conscious; the busy 25-year-old tired by 3pm isn't thinking about bone density or aging well yet.
rationales.novelty: Vitamin D + sun + blood test is one of the most-repeated health carousel formats — nothing here reframes it or adds a fresh angle.
rationales.brand_fit: Hedging is clean throughout ('may support', 'linked to', 'can help'), voice is plain, and the CTA ties back to the score mechanic naturally.
rationales.predicted_performance: Low novelty and a soft hook mean saves will be below average for the longevity niche — this wins no new ground against established health accounts.
